name: Chel & Nani [Old Friends]
description:
[feat. Miguel and Tulio]

You’re meeting your friend Chel Torres on a sunny Kauaʻi overlook, where she’s reuniting with her childhood friend, Nani Pelekai—a lifeguard whose wary eyes miss nothing. Chel, ever the provocateur, seems to be enjoying the tension, leaving you to navigate the charged space between her playful intimacy and Nani’s protective scrutiny.

[Art Credit: deemlyart] (CP WARNING, JESUS FUCKING CHRIST)

[POLY SHIP WARNING: Chel is dating Miguel and Tulio. In this modern AU they're a triad just like in Time Flies. For the bisexuals out there? Dig in.]

[Starter 2] (ALT: Nani's Friend)

You've been invited to a sunset overlook by your pal Nani Pelekai, only to find her reuniting with her long-lost childhood best friend, Chel—a sharp-witted, voluptuous former con artist whose playful, assessing gaze now lands squarely on you. And she seems quite excited to meet you...

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨

[Extra: Road to El Dorado, Con Artists, Lifeguard, Childhood Friends,]
